ground_truth.title: Top Web Design Companies In NYC
ground_truth.main_content: Looking for a web design company in NYC, the world-leading arts and tech hub? After evaluating hundreds of agency profiles, success stories, and client reviews, we’ve carefully compiled a list of top New York City web design agencies. Explore our directory and filter the selection by location, budget, hourly rate, and other criteria to find a partner for your next project. 10 Most Popular Website Design and Development Companies in New York City Compared Compare the 10 most popular website design and development agencies in New York City. Use the table below to get a quick overview of their hourly rates, company size, key services, and best-fit clients to help you find the perfect partner for your needs. Agency Name Hourly Rate Minimal Budget Size Best For Lounge Lizard Inquire Inquire 50 - 99 Web development & digital marketing campaigns Storm Brain $145 $10,000-$25,000 Under 49 Digital marketing & brand strategy Digital Silk $150 Inquire 100 - 249 Digital experiences, branding, web & app development Infinum Inquire $50,000 & Up 250 - 499 Digital product creation & business growth strategies Lform Design $185 $10,000-$25,000 Under 49 B2B web design & inbound marketing Mercury Development $50 Inquire 250 - 499 Software development, mobile apps, & data science Goji Labs $149 $25,000-$50,000 Under 49 Web & mobile app development for startups & businesses Bighorn Web Solutions LLC Inquire $25,000-$50,000 Under 49 Shopify & Magento development, site speed optimization SmartSites $100 Inquire 100 - 249 Digital marketing services, including SEO, PPC, & web development DD.NYC $150 Inquire 50 - 99 Branding, web design & graphics for high-profile clients We Curated The Best New York City Web Design Agencies For You 840 Companies - Rankings updated: December 20, 2025 Every agency featured on DesignRush is vetted for expertise and client satisfaction to support your decision-making. Some listings may be sponsored. Lounge Lizard Growth Marketing & Web Design Experts Since 1998 With Lounge Lizard, you'll experience web design services that transform your online presence into a powerful growth engine. The Bureau Of Small Projects sets the standard by blending creativity with strategy. A record of innovation underscores our work in branding, web development, and digital marketing. Our deep understanding of digital strategy ensures unmatched results for brands of all sizes, from startups to Fortune 500 leaders like SONY and P&G. Our deep understanding of user experience, interface architecture, and modern web design ensures unmatched results. Explore our portfolio and connect today. Our innovative thinking sets a new benchmark in digital presence, driving measurable growth for brands ready to lead their markets.
